Title: Star Trek: Enterprise
Plot: The year is 2151. Earth has spent the last 88 years since learning how to travel faster than the speed of light studying under the wisdom of their alien ally called the 'Vulcans'. Now, the first crew of human explorers sets out into deep space on a ship called the 'Enterprise' to see what is beyond our solar system.
Awards: Won 4 Primetime Emmys. 14 wins & 50 nominations total
